blocks.text: Dual-hub manufacturing in south east Asia. One standard of quality.

Jinhao Xinyuan Group operates high-capacity, FSC® & ISO-certified packaging factories in Bắc Ninh (Vietnam) and Dongguan (China). From folding cartons and rigid boxes to manuals, labels, and shelf-ready packaging, we combine premium printing, consistent color, and export-ready QA—delivered on time worldwide.
Request a Quote Explore our Vietnamese plant Explore our Chinese plant
3 regions serviced:
Asia, Europe, North America
Certifications:
FSC®, ISO 9001, SMETA, G7®, GMI, ISTA
Materials:
Recyclable kraft/white liners, FSC paperboard, eco inks
What We Make

From offset-printed product labels to short-run digital sticker printing, XinYuan delivers precision, consistency, and versatility for brands worldwide.We manufacture a wide range of adhesive labels and custom stickers designed for durability, vibrant color, and long-term adhesion.Our label printing facilities in Vietnam and China are equipped with offset, flexographic, and digital presses, allowing us to produce large-scale commercial orders as well as custom short runs with equal quality.

Every label is printed to withstand handling, transport, and temperature changes, maintaining strong adhesion and perfect color accuracy.Whether for food packaging, cosmetics, logistics, or consumer goods, XinYuan helps brands communicate clearly and consistently through professional, high-quality labeling solutions.
Key Features:
• Offset, flexo, and digital printing for short or large production runs
Offset, flexo, and digital printing for short or large production runs
• Wide range of adhesive types: permanent, removable, freezer-grade, and high-tack
Wide range of adhesive types: permanent, removable, freezer-grade, and high-tack
• FSC®-certified label materials and water-based inks
FSC®-certified label materials and water-based inks
• Die-cutting, embossing, and spot UV or metallic finishes
Die-cutting, embossing, and spot UV or metallic finishes
• Custom roll, sheet, or shrink-sleeve labels
Custom roll, sheet, or shrink-sleeve labels

blocks.alt: Shopper examining shelf-ready packaging in retail aisle

blocks.text: • Retail packing
Protective, high-impact packaging that enhances product visibility and shelf appeal. Built with durable board and vivid printing — perfect for FMCG, e-commerce, and retail displays.
View

blocks.alt: hands holding instruction manual with assembly diagram

blocks.text: • Instructions & Manual Printing
Clear, durable manuals and inserts produced with precision offset and digital printing. Ideal for electronics, appliances, and healthcare documentation.

blocks.alt: Technician holding freshly printed round adhesive labels

blocks.text: • Labels & stickers
Vibrant, reliable adhesive labels printed on FSC® paper with strong color and adhesion. Suited for food, cosmetics, and consumer product branding.

blocks.alt: Woman holding kraft paper shopping bag and packaging boxes

blocks.text: • Cardboard, Trays & inserts
Functional corrugated and paperboard inserts that keep products protected and neatly arranged. Built for strength, precision, and automated packing efficiency.

blocks.alt: custom handle folding boxes with blue and orange graphics

blocks.text: • Folding cartons
Stylish, lightweight cartons for retail and food packaging. Finished with premium printing and coating options that deliver both quality and speed in production.

blocks.alt: transparent plastic boxes with compartments and lids

blocks.text: • Artifical Packing
Durable, reusable PP and HDPE boxes engineered for long-term use. Ideal for logistics, industrial goods, and e-commerce fulfillment with strong visual presentation.
Why We Run Two Hubs

Operating plants in Vietnam and China lets us align lead times, tariffs, and logistics to your market, while maintaining the same color targets, QC steps, and traceability across both sites. You get capacity flexibility (single SKU, multi-country rollouts, pilot → scale), with one team and one standard.
Capabilities
Printing & PrepressHeidelberg/Roland/Komori offset lines, digital/CTP proofing, G7®/GMI color control, variable finishes (UV, soft-touch, matte/gloss), foiling/embossing/debossing.
Converting & FinishingAuto die-cut, window patching, lamination, folder-gluer lines (straight-line, lock-bottom, 4/6-corner), semi-auto rigid box assembly, corrugation (B/E/BC flutes).
Quality & TestingISO 9001 workflows, bar-code traceability, AQL checkpoints, ISTA transit tests (compression, drop, vibration), food-contact varnish options.
Environmental & Social Compliance
FSC® chain-of-custody, water-based/vegetable inks, recycled fiber options, trim-waste recovery, SMETA 4-pillar audits, continuous CAPR improvement.
